moments.title: World Cup 2026 Semi-Final Showdowns
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 reaches its penultimate stage with the semi-finals kicking off today, as four nations battle for a spot in the final.

angles.name: Semi-Final Day 1
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The FIFA World Cup semi-finals begin today. Who are you backing to make it to the final?

angles.name: Road to the Final
angles.copy: After weeks of drama, only four teams remain. The World Cup semi-finals are HERE! Will it be glory or heartbreak?

moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final Approaches
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates this Sunday with the highly anticipated final, where the world's best footballing nation will be crowned.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Just days to go until the biggest game in football! The World Cup Final is this Sunday. Who's lifting the trophy?

angles.name: Anticipation Builds
angles.copy: The excitement is building! Sunday sees the World Cup Final. Will it be a classic? Who are your predictions for the champions?

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins this Thursday at Royal Birkdale, as the world's best golfers compete for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Major Golf Starts
angles.copy: Golf's oldest major is back! The Open Championship tees off Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick to conquer the links?

angles.name: Claret Jug Hunt
angles.copy: The pursuit of the Claret Jug begins in two days! All eyes on Royal Birkdale for The Open Championship. Get ready for some incredible golf.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Champions Crowned
moments.blurb: Wimbledon 2026 concluded on Sunday, July 12, with new champions crowned in the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles tournaments after two weeks of thrilling tennis.

angles.name: Wimbledon Recap
angles.copy: The grass court season is over! Wimbledon 2026 saw some incredible matches and new champions crowned on Sunday. What was your favourite moment?

angles.name: Tennis Talk
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Wimbledon 2026? The champions were decided this past weekend. Who impressed you most at the All England Club?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts, kicks off next weekend from July 24-27 in Suffolk.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Festival vibes incoming! Latitude Festival is just over a week away in Suffolk. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Get Ready for Latitude
angles.copy: Packing your wellies and glitter? Latitude Festival returns next weekend for four days of music, arts and fun!

moments.title: Latest UK Singles Chart Revealed
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated last Friday, revealing the nation's current number one track and biggest climbers.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Who's at the top of the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Tune in to Nation Hits to hear the latest number one! #UKCharts

angles.name: New Music Vibes
angles.copy: What's your favourite track from the latest UK Singles Chart? Any new entries you can't get enough of?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Heats Up
moments.blurb: The latest season of Love Island UK continues to deliver daily drama, romance, and unexpected twists from the villa.

angles.name: Villa Latest
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! What's got everyone talking from the villa today?

angles.name: Relationship Status
angles.copy: Are your favourite Islanders still coupled up? Catch up on all the Love Island UK gossip and predictions!

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt Turns 80
moments.blurb: Legendary American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice and hits like 'You're No Good', celebrates her 80th birthday tomorrow, July 15.

angles.name: Happy 80th Linda
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the iconic Linda Ronstadt turns 80! What's your go-to track from the incredible singer?

angles.name: Ronstadt's Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating 80 years of Linda Ronstadt tomorrow! A true music pioneer, her influence spans rock, folk, country and more.

moments.title: Stewart Copeland's 74th Birthday
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer and co-founder of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: The iconic beat of The Police! Stewart Copeland turns 74 on Thursday. What's your favourite Police track featuring his incredible drumming?

angles.name: Police Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th to Stewart Copeland this Thursday! From The Police to film scores, a true musical innovator.

moments.title: Geezer Butler Turns 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the influential bassist and primary lyricist of heavy metal pioneers Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Sabbath Icon
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the legendary Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath this Friday! What's your favourite Sabbath riff or lyric from the man himself?

angles.name: Metal Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating Geezer Butler's 77th on Friday! The bassist who helped define heavy metal with Black Sabbath.

moments.title: M.I.A. Celebrates 51st Birthday
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A., known for her unique blend of electronic, hip-hop, and world music, turns 51 on Saturday, July 18.

angles.name: Happy Birthday M.I.A.
angles.copy: Saturday is M.I.A.'s 51st birthday! From 'Paper Planes' to 'Bad Girls', her music always pushes boundaries. What's your favourite M.I.A. track?

angles.name: Global Sound
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 51st birthday to the incredible M.I.A. this Saturday! A true artist who blends genres effortlessly.

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Brian May, the iconic lead guitarist of Queen and astrophysicist, celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Queen Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo from the legend?

angles.name: Red Special Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating 79 years of rock royalty! Brian May of Queen turns 79 this Sunday. A true guitar hero.

moments.title: Carlos Santana Turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, Latin, and blues, celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Santana's Sound
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the incomparable Carlos Santana this Monday! What's the Santana track that always gets you grooving?

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Celebrating a true guitar god, Carlos Santana, who turns 79 on Monday! His music transcends generations. #MusicLegend

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music, acting career, and iconic style, celebrates her 57th birthday on Thursday, July 24.

angles.name: Happy Birthday J.Lo
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 this Thursday. What's your favourite J.Lo hit to dance to?

angles.name: Iconic J.Lo
angles.copy: Fifty-seven and fabulous! Wishing Jennifer Lopez a very happy birthday this Thursday. A true multi-talented icon.

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: Mid-July marks the peak of the summer holidays for many schools across the UK, with families enjoying breaks and staycations.

angles.copy: Are you on your summer holidays yet? Schools are out for many across the UK! What are your plans for soaking up the sun?

angles.name: Staycation Nation
angles.copy: Making the most of the UK summer holidays? Whether you're at the beach or exploring, tell us your favourite local spots!

moments.title: Welsh Summer Holidays Underway
moments.blurb: Summer holidays are in full swing across Wales, with many families heading to the coast or enjoying local attractions.

angles.copy: Perfect weather for the Welsh coast! Are you hitting the beaches in Swansea, Pembrokeshire, or Carmarthenshire this summer?

moments.blurb: Devon is buzzing with activity as summer holidays are underway, drawing visitors to its beaches, moors, and vibrant towns.
